title: Boat and Minecart ++
body:
### **Francais :**

Ce texture pack transforme tous les bateaux en véritables bateaux de course et donne aux minecarts un look ultra-sportif pour des trajets encore plus dynamiques !


### **English :**

This texture pack transforms all boats into real racing boats and gives minecarts an ultra-sporty look for even more dynamic journeys !

![**Preview :**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0440bd9f5a923be66f18a88304ef81e2c923db3b_0.webp)

### **Requierments :**

Il s’agit d'un pack de ressources CEM, donc il a besoin d’**[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** et de **[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** ou d’Optifine pour fonctionner.

This is CEM resource pack, so it needs **[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** and **[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** or Optifine to work.


 

### **Source :**

**[CAR BOAT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/car-boat)**
